examples: Before the game against Metalist Kharkiv coach Jupp Heynckes warned of being too sure because of the 4-0 win in the first leg.
English outfit Newcastle went through against Metalist Kharkiv after Shola Ameobi's penalty sealed a 1-0 win in Ukraine.
And the season-long loan for influential midfielder Alexei Eremenko could end this month if Metalist Kharkiv decide to sell the playmaker.
The Portuguese side, who put out Manchester City in the previous round, drew 1-1 at Metalist Kharkhiv of Ukraine to advance 3-2 on aggregate.
